summary: Tested Country/Language Selector feature on landing page and signup page. All 5 locale options (US-English, UAE-English, BE-Français, BE-Nederlands, BE-Deutsch) work correctly. Language switching updates entire page content including nav, hero, pricing, FAQ, reviews, lawyers, and CTA sections. Pricing shows correct currency (USD/AED/EUR). Country-specific lawyers are displayed. localStorage persists selection across page reloads. Signup page reads localStorage to pre-select country and shows correct pricing. Backend accepts country=AE for UAE registration.
passed_tests: Landing: Country selector button visible in navbar between FAQ and Sign in
Landing: Dropdown shows all 5 locale options with flags
Landing: US-English is default locale
Landing: Selecting BE-Français switches entire page to French
Landing: Selecting BE-Nederlands switches entire page to Dutch
Landing: Selecting BE-Deutsch switches entire page to German
Landing: Selecting UAE switches to UAE-specific content
Landing: Selecting US switches back to English with USD pricing
Landing: Pricing shows USD ($0/$69/$149) for US
Landing: Pricing shows AED (AED 0/AED 249/AED 549) for UAE
Landing: Pricing shows EUR (0€/65€/139€) for Belgium
Landing: US lawyers shown (Sarah Mitchell, Archer Carter, Diana Torres)
Landing: UAE lawyers shown (Fatima Al Mazrouei, Raj Patel, Khalid Al Rashid)
Landing: Belgian lawyers shown (Sophie Lecomte, Thomas Dupont, Julie Renard)
Landing: localStorage persists locale selection on page refresh
Landing: Selector styling matches requirements (white bg, 0.5px border #ebebeb, border-radius 20px, padding 7px 14px, font-size 13px)
Signup: Country dropdown has UAE option (US, AE, BE)
Signup: localStorage locale pre-selects country (ae-en → AE)
Signup: AED pricing shown when UAE selected
Signup: EUR pricing shown when Belgium selected
Signup: USD pricing shown when US selected
Signup: UAE info box visible when UAE selected
Signup: Region/Language dropdowns hidden for UAE (only shown for Belgium)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register accepts country=AE
Backend: POST /api/auth/register accepts country=US
Backend: POST /api/auth/register accepts country=BE with region/language
Backend: Invalid country defaults to US
Backend: Login with existing Belgian user works (regression)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_country_locale_selector.py (New test file for country/locale selector feature)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing with unique emails (test_uae_*, test_us_*, test_be_fr_*, test_be_nl_*, test_be_de_*, test_invalid_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country/Language Selector feature fully tested. Landing page has CountrySelector component in navbar between FAQ and Sign in. 5 locales: us-en, ae-en, be-fr, be-nl, be-de. Translations in /app/frontend/src/data/landingTranslations.js. localStorage key is 'archer_locale'. Signup page reads localStorage to pre-select country. Backend accepts country US/BE/AE in POST /api/auth/register. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_country_locale_selector.py can be reused for regression testing.
